description: V6 飞书 ↔ channel-server 业务桥接层。一 bot 一 bridge,从 routing.toml [bots.<name>] 派生配置。飞书 WSS 长连接(CardAwareClient)接收 im.message.receive_v1/bot.added/user.added|deleted/chat.disbanded/card.action.trigger 事件;通过 BridgeAPIClient WS 连到 channel-server 收发 Bridge API 消息。入站: 消息 → _forward → build_message → WS;出站: _on_bridge_event → 按 irc_encoding.parse kind 路由(msg/plain→send_text,side→reply_in_thread,edit→reply-to-placeholder,sys→按 own/supervisor 分发)。V6 支持 supervises(监管他人 channel → squad 卡片 + thread 镜像)、lazy_create(bot_added 时 CLI 懒创建 channel+agent)、CSAT 卡片回调。

key_classes_functions.name: FeishuBridge
key_classes_functions.purpose: 主编排类:持有 lark.Client + FeishuSender + BridgeAPIClient + ChannelMapper + OutboundRouter + routing/supervised 映射 + 会话缓存 + 去重 deque。

key_classes_functions.name: FeishuBridge._on_message
key_classes_functions.purpose: im.message.receive_v1:自发回环过滤 + msg_id 去重(maxlen=10000 LRU)+ parse_message 分发(text/post/image/...)+ thread reply 回链 conv(parent_id→conv_id,__side 包装)+ _forward。

key_classes_functions.name: FeishuBridge._on_bridge_event
key_classes_functions.purpose: channel-server 出站分发:按 own/supervised 判定; message 走 _EVENT_HANDLERS 映射,supervised message 走 _handle_supervised_message 镜像卡片。

key_classes_functions.name: FeishuBridge._handle_sys_event
key_classes_functions.purpose: 按 conv ownership 分发 event:own→csat_request;supervisor→help_requested/help_timeout/mode_changed/chat_info/channel_resolved 刷新卡片。

key_classes_functions.name: FeishuBridge._handle_supervised_message
key_classes_functions.purpose: V6 监管:他人 channel 消息 → 本 bot 群创建 ConvThread(card+thread),thread reply 按 source/kind 染色 [客户]/[AI]/[侧栏]。

key_classes_functions.name: FeishuBridge._lazy_create_channel_and_agent
key_classes_functions.purpose: bot_added 懒创建:zchat channel create <id> --external-chat <chat_id> --bot + zchat agent create。

key_classes_functions.name: FeishuBridge._on_card_action
key_classes_functions.purpose: 卡片按钮点击:hijack/resolve→ws build_message(/cmd);csat score→ws build_event(csat_score),recall 旧卡 + send 感谢卡。

key_classes_functions.name: FeishuBridge.build_event_handler / start
key_classes_functions.purpose: 构造 lark EventDispatcherHandler 注册 5 种飞书事件 + start() 启动 BridgeAPIClient + CardAwareClient WSS。

key_classes_functions.name: BridgeConfig / FeishuConfig / LazyCreateConfig
key_classes_functions.purpose: V6 dataclass:bot_name/feishu(app_id/secret)/channel_server_url/upload_dir/routing_path/lazy_create。

key_classes_functions.name: build_config_from_routing
key_classes_functions.purpose: 从 routing.toml 派生 BridgeConfig(调 routing_reader.read_bot_config)。

key_classes_functions.name: BridgeAPIClient
key_classes_functions.purpose: 纯 WS 传输层,后台线程 connect_loop + 自动重连 + send(线程安全 run_coroutine_threadsafe)+ on_message 回调。

key_classes_functions.name: OutboundRouter
key_classes_functions.purpose: 按 kind 路由出站:route(msg/plain→send_text,side→thread reply);on_edit 用 reply-to-placeholder(飞书 patch 不支持 text);_msg_id_map/_csat_card_msg_ids/_threads 缓存。

key_classes_functions.name: ConvThread
key_classes_functions.purpose: 监管 thread 状态:conversation_id/supervising_chat_id/card_msg_id/mode/state/metadata。

key_classes_functions.name: FeishuSender
key_classes_functions.purpose: lark-oapi im.v1 封装:send_text/send_card/update_message/update_card/reply_in_thread/recall/get_chat_info 及 _sync 版本。

key_classes_functions.name: build_conv_card / csat_card / thank_you_card
key_classes_functions.purpose: 飞书 interactive card JSON 纯函数构建;state→template 色值 + update_multi=true 让 PATCH 对所有查看者生效。

key_classes_functions.name: ChannelMapper
key_classes_functions.purpose: channel_id ↔ feishu chat_id 双向映射,lstrip # 归一化。

key_classes_functions.name: register_parser / parse_message
key_classes_functions.purpose: 装饰器注册表 + 分发解析器,支持 text/post/image/file/audio/media/interactive/merge_forward/sticker/share_chat/share_user/location/todo/system/hongbao/vote/video_chat/calendar/folder。

key_classes_functions.name: read_bridge_mappings / read_supervised_channels / read_bot_config / reverse_mapping
key_classes_functions.purpose: 独立工具读 routing.toml,不依赖 channel_server.routing;支持 supervises 语法(bot:<name>;tag/pattern V7+ 跳过 warn)+ credential_file 解析。

key_classes_functions.name: CardAwareClient
key_classes_functions.purpose: 继承 lark.ws.Client,覆写 _handle_data_frame 补 CARD 帧分发(lark_oapi 1.5.3 默认丢弃)。

key_classes_functions.name: FeishuTestClient
key_classes_functions.purpose: E2E 测试用真飞书 API 封装:send_message/send_card/list_messages/get_message/assert_* 轮询断言/send_thread_reply/click_card_action(模拟 payload)。

depends_on: channel_server(运行时 CS 端,bridge 不 import)
tests: tests/unit/test_group_manager.py — 5 test: ChannelMapper 基本操作
tests/unit/test_sender.py — 3 test: send_text/card/update_message API 调用
tests/unit/test_card_action.py — 9 test: CardAwareClient CARD 帧分发 + csat/hijack/resolve/unknown action
tests/unit/test_client_extended.py — 12 test: FeishuTestClient 断言辅助
tests/unit/test_visibility_router.py — 3 test: 兼容性(old visibility_router path)
tests/e2e/test_bridge_lazy_create.py — 4 test: lazy create CLI / channel_id 生成 / 已映射跳过 / disband
tests/e2e/test_csat_lifecycle.py — 2 test: CSAT 全流程 / 多 channel 独立
evidence_file_lines: src/feishu_bridge/bridge.py:96-103 — instance_id=feishu-<bot_name> 保证唯一(旧版共用导致 CS 只保留最后一个)
src/feishu_bridge/bridge.py:280-296 — thread reply 路由 parent_id→conv,__side 包装
src/feishu_bridge/outbound.py:130-149 — route 按 kind 分发
src/feishu_bridge/routing_reader.py:56-111 — read_supervised_channels 解析 supervises 语法
